headline: Domino's Growth Trends Reflect a New Phase for Pizza Demand
summary: DPZ's growth rests on aggregators, carryout, loyalty, technology and scale, though weak sales and estimate pressure cloud the near-term outlook.

raw.headline: Domino's Growth Trends Reflect a New Phase for Pizza Demand

headline: Yum! Brands Appoints Nai De Leon as Chief People & Culture Officer
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky., July 21, 2026--Yum! Brands, Inc. (NYSE: YUM) today announced that Nai De Leon has been appointed Chief People & Culture Officer, effective November 1, 2026.

headline: Yum! Brands: Fear Is On The Menu
summary: Yum! Brands faces a cyclosporiasis outbreak, but the impact appears less severe than past industry incidents. Check out why YUM stock is a buy.
